key_directories: src/core/ — protocol types, error classes, constants, BDHKE crypto, keyset derivation
src/core/crypto/ — hash_to_curve, blind signing, keyset key derivation
src/core/crypto/__tests__/ — BDHKE and keyset unit tests + test helpers
src/db/ — Prisma client and repository layer (all DB queries)
src/routes/ — Fastify route handlers (health + v1/ NUT endpoints)
src/routes/v1/ — swap, mint, melt, keys, keysets, info, checkstate
src/utils/ — config loader (Zod-validated env), Zod request schemas

coding_conventions.naming_style: camelCase for functions/variables/methods, PascalCase for classes/interfaces/types, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants
coding_conventions.error_handling: Custom CashuError base class with numeric error codes (src/core/errors.ts). Typed subclasses: ProofInvalidError(10000), TokenAlreadySpentError(11000), TransactionNotBalancedError(11001), KeysetNotFoundError(12001), etc. Each has toJSON() for API responses. Route handlers catch CashuError and return 400 with err.toJSON().
coding_conventions.import_style: ESM only with .js extensions (NodeNext resolution). Node stdlib first (node:crypto), then third-party (@noble/*, fastify, zod, prisma), then local (relative ./). Uses 'type' imports for type-only imports.
coding_conventions.module_system: ESM (type: module in package.json, NodeNext in tsconfig)
coding_conventions.formatting: Tabs for indentation, single quotes, semicolons always, 100 char line width (Biome)
coding_conventions.test_framework: Vitest with globals: true. Tests co-located in __tests__/ directories next to source. Test helpers in test-helpers.ts.
key_utilities: src/core/errors.ts — CashuError and all typed error subclasses, always use these instead of plain Error
src/core/crypto/bdhke.ts — hashToCurve, hashToCurveString, signBlindedMessage, verifyProof (BDHKE protocol)
src/db/repository.ts — all Prisma queries centralized here, services never use Prisma directly
src/lightning/interface.ts — ILightningBackend interface for all Lightning operations
src/utils/config.ts — loadConfig() with Zod-validated environment variables
src/utils/schemas.ts — Zod schemas for all route request validation
src/core/types.ts — all Cashu protocol TypeScript interfaces

working: All NUT-00 through NUT-07 implemented (BDHKE crypto, keyset derivation, swap, mint, melt, info, checkstate)
33 unit tests passing, 12 integration tests skipped (need PostgreSQL)
Prisma schema with 4 models: Keyset, SpentProof, BlindSignature, PendingQuote
Saga recovery for swap (double-spend → replay stored sigs) and mint (ISSUED → replay)
Zod validation at route edge for all endpoints
Config loader with Zod validation and fail-fast on missing env vars
incomplete: LND gRPC backend (src/lightning/lnd.ts is stubbed — all methods throw 'not implemented')
Integration tests against cashu-ts client not written
Swagger/OpenAPI docs dependency present but likely not configured in routes
WebSocket dependency present (@fastify/websocket) but not used yet (Phase 3 NUT-17)
Melt flow has a known limitation: if Lightning payment fails after proofs are spent, proofs are not unspent (noted in code comment)
current_state.test_coverage: 33 passing unit tests across 5 test files, 12 integration tests skipped (require PostgreSQL). Coverage areas: BDHKE crypto (13 tests), keyset derivation (10 tests), FakeWallet (8 tests), health route (1 test), mint service (1 passing + 12 skipped integration).

architecture_notes.layers: Routes → Services → DB/Lightning (strict DDD boundaries, never skip layers)
architecture_notes.db_pattern: All queries in src/db/repository.ts, Prisma client in src/db/client.ts. SERIALIZABLE isolation for atomic spend+sign.
architecture_notes.lightning_pattern: ILightningBackend interface. FakeWallet for testing, LndBackend stubbed for production.
architecture_notes.keyset_management: Keyset derived from seed on init, stored in DB + in-memory Map. Old keysets stay spendable but not issuable.
architecture_notes.saga_recovery: SpentProof + BlindSignature written atomically. On resubmit, match B_ payloads against stored signatures. Mint saga recovers by quoteId.
architecture_notes.crypto_note: hashToCurveString(secret) for string secrets (UTF-8 encodes internally). hashToCurve(Uint8Array) for raw bytes.

context.summary: A TypeScript Cashu mint (Chaumian eCash) API service implementing NUT-00 through NUT-07, built with Fastify 5, PostgreSQL/Prisma, and @noble/curves cryptography. Phase 1 is feature-complete with 33 passing unit tests — all core NUTs work (keyset derivation, blind signing, swap, mint/melt via Lightning quotes, token state checking). The LND gRPC production Lightning backend is stubbed; testing uses a deterministic FakeWallet. The codebase is clean, well-typed, and follows strict DDD boundaries.
